candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred generic revenue line and matches Net Sales values.

candidates.row_label: Sales Gain/Loss on Assets Held for Sale
candidates.why: Not revenue; disposal gain/loss line, so not appropriate.
Also a valid top-line sales label; suitable fallback if Total Revenue is missing in some years.

variables.notes: Using priority list for revenue line changes across years; do not sum.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs beneath revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line most consistent with cost of sales.

candidates.why: Overhead-like operating expense bucket, but explicit SG&A row exists so this is less preferred under hierarchy.
R&D-related line; could belong in XSGA only if used alongside XRD, but appears empty in preview and a better R&D line exists.
Overhead component, but explicit SG&A row exists so components are less preferred than the dedicated SG&A row.
Valid SG&A component, but explicit SG&A row exists so not needed unless SG&A row were missing/insufficient.
Possible overhead component, but explicit SG&A row exists.
Component of personnel costs; less preferred than explicit SG&A row.
Possible overhead component; less preferred than explicit SG&A row.
Explicit SG&A row, populated, so hierarchy says to select this row only unless separate R&D should also be included for subtraction logic.
Share-based compensation can be SG&A-related, but line appears supplemental/standalone and explicit SG&A row exists.
Dedicated R&D expense line above Operating profit. Since separate from SG&A row, include in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it in PROF formula.
Too generic and appears empty; inferior to explicit populated rows.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet capitalized cost, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit populated SG&A row exists, so selected it. Added separate above-EBIT R&D line as required by the XSGA-XRD interaction rule because it appears separately reported rather than embedded in the SG&A row.

candidates.why: Possible R&D label, but preview is empty and a clearer populated R&D line exists.
Dedicated R&D expense line above Operating profit; best match.
Balance sheet asset balance, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross capitalized development cost, not expense.
Amortization contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Priority list for dedicated R&D expense labels; both are above EBIT candidates, with Research and Development clearly preferred.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line, not preferred when a direct interest expense line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only lease-interest component, so too narrow to be primary choice.
Direct interest expense line; best match and preferred.
Too broad/other finance costs; poor match.
Too broad/other finance costs; poor match.
Acceptable fallback if direct interest expense unavailable; broader net finance cost line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component only; too narrow for primary mapping.

variables.notes: Priority list: direct interest expense first, then broader net finance cost line, then total financial expenses as last fallback. Do not sum.

candidates.why: Reserve component only, not total book equity.
Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests, matching BE rule.
This is minority interest, not BE.
Could represent total equity, but less preferred because owner equity line exists and this may include NCI.
Explicitly includes minority interest, so not suitable when separate parent equity exists.

variables.notes: Selected parent equity to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, less preferred than balance-sheet NCI line for MIB.
Income statement attribution line, less preferred than balance-sheet NCI line.
Income statement attribution line, less preferred than balance-sheet equity line.
Direct balance-sheet minority interest / NCI equity line; best match.
Also a direct balance-sheet minority interest label; valid fallback.

variables.notes: Priority list for non-controlling interest labels on the balance sheet; do not sum.
